/usr/bin/c++ -g -arch arm64 -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/test1.dir/test1.cpp.o CMakeFiles/test1.dir/value.cpp.o -o test1   -L/opt/homebrew/Cellar/flint/3.5.0/lib  -L/opt/homebrew/Cellar/gmp/6.3.0/lib  -L/opt/homebrew/Cellar/mpfr/4.2.2/lib  -Wl,-rpath,/opt/homebrew/Cellar/flint/3.5.0/lib -Wl,-rpath,/opt/homebrew/Cellar/gmp/6.3.0/lib -Wl,-rpath,/opt/homebrew/Cellar/mpfr/4.2.2/lib -lflint -lmpfr -lgmp
